title: Rich Truffle Mangalorean Indian Shrimp Wrap
description: A Mangalorean-inspired dish featuring succulent shrimp, truffle oil, and pandan leaf wraps, perfect for a flavorful and aromatic snack. This gluten-free friendly recipe combines the umami of truffles with the bold spices of Indian cuisine.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the grated ginger and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly.
Add the shrimp to the skillet and cook until they are pink and fully cooked.
Stir in the truffle oil, garam masala, salt, and black pepper.
Add the blanched and seasoned namul to the skillet and stir to combine.
Warm the pandan leaves by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20 seconds.
Assemble the wraps by spooning the shrimp and namul mixture onto the center of a pandan leaf and folding the leaf to enclose.
Serve the wraps immediately and enjoy.
